heroKicker: You just played one. Now make one.
heroHeadline: Turn any gift into a mini-escape room.
heroSub: Puzzify turns a digital gift, message, or announcement into a personalized online quest. You build the mystery — they play to unlock their reward. No app, no login.
playerPrompt: Where did we first share a coffee? One word.
trustLine: Spend five minutes. Deliver something unforgettable.
howSub: From blank canvas to a link worth opening — in the time it takes to wrap a present.

how.d: Stack puzzles in the Creator Studio. Pick a theme, add your clues and the reward at the end.
Share a single link in WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram — or print it on a card.
No download. They solve each clue and watch the box open on their reward.

ptSub: Mix and match modules per step. Each one reads the same theme tokens.

pt.title: Ask something only they know
pt.desc: One word, a date, an inside joke — type it right and the next step opens.

pt.title: Multiple choice with media
pt.desc: Pose a question with a photo, audio, or video clue. The right answer lights up green.

pt.title: Hide a clue in a scene
pt.desc: Drop a pulsing hotspot on any photo. They tap to find what you hid.

ucSub: Re-skin the same components — no holiday is ever hardcoded. Flip a theme and the whole quest changes mood.
whySub: A surprise they unlock beats a link they ignore. Built to convert the moment of delight into the next quest.

why.d: The journey to the reward is the present. People screenshot the finale, not the gift card.
No app, no login, no signup for recipients. They tap a link and start playing.
Runs inside WhatsApp, Telegram, and Instagram in-app browsers on any phone.
English, Persian, and more — layouts mirror natively with no broken text.

prSub: Make your first quest for nothing. Pay once when you want the premium finish — or scale to a team.

pricing.name: Premium Box
pricing.tagline: For the surprise that has to land

partnerBlock.title: Puzzify × WelloWork — play your way to a stronger team.
partnerBlock.desc: We’ve teamed up with WelloWork, the Swedish workplace-performance platform, to bring Puzzify quests inside the tools companies already use. Employers turn onboarding, training, and team-building into games employees actually want to play.

features.d: Co-built quests that turn cognitive training and culture moments into a shared challenge.
Roll out branded welcome quests to every new hire from a single dashboard.
Plugs into WelloWork’s manager view, so engagement is something you can actually see.

finalSub: Create your first quest free — they will be asking how you did it.
footTagline: Turn any gift into a mini-escape room.
